parts.text: Transform this admin dashboard into a polished desktop app homepage for Forge, a local AI R&D delivery system. Keep the clean enterprise SaaS shell with a stable left sidebar and top context bar, but redesign the content into a calm, high-readability dashboard in simplified Chinese. Use a light theme with slate text, blue primary actions, and restrained orange highlights. The page title should feel like a decision desk, not a data wall. Left main column: a large module called 项目状态 with a compact list of projects showing 项目名称, 当前阶段, 负责人, 健康状态, 下一个里程碑. Beneath it, a module called 待处理事项 with a tight action list showing type badges like 待确认, 待拍板, 待补充, 待推进 and one primary button 去处理. Right column: a slimmer rail module called 风险与提醒 with concise risk rows for 延期风险, 缺失关键材料, 阶段卡点, 放行风险. Sidebar items should be 仪表盘, 项目管理, AI员工, 资产管理. The whole design should feel premium, minimal, structured, and product-grade, with lists and section headers instead of generic metric cards. Make it look like a modern desktop SaaS screenshot, not a wireframe.
